# Data Model: Book Detail Page (Fiche Œuvre)

**Branch**: `005-book-detail-view` | **Generated by**: `/speckit-plan` | **Date**: 2026-05-25

## Entity Graph

```
Editor (ManyToOne, not null) ──────┐
Translator (ManyToOne, nullable) ──┤
Author (ManyToMany) ───────────────┤──▶  Book  ◀── BookImage (OneToMany)
Illustrator (ManyToMany) ──────────┘
```

---

## Enum: BookStatus

```php
// src/Entity/Enum/BookStatus.php
namespace App\Entity\Enum;

enum BookStatus: string
{
    case PENDING   = 'PENDING';
    case PUBLISHED = 'PUBLISHED';
    case REJECTED  = 'REJECTED';
}
```

---

## Enum: BookImageTab

```php
// src/Entity/Enum/BookImageTab.php
namespace App\Entity\Enum;

enum BookImageTab: string
{
    case TOME    = 'Tome';
    case DOS     = 'Dos';
    case TRANCHE = 'Tranche';
    case PAGES   = 'Pages';
    case CARTE   = 'Carte';
}
```

---

## Entity: Book

```php
// src/Entity/Book.php
#[ORM\Entity(repositoryClass: BookRepository::class)]
#[ORM\Index(columns: ['slug'],   name: 'idx_book_slug')]
#[ORM\Index(columns: ['status'], name: 'idx_book_status')]
#[UniqueEntity(fields: ['isbn'], message: 'Cet ISBN est déjà enregistré.')]
class Book
```

| Field | PHP Type | DB Type | Nullable | Constraints | Notes |
|-------|----------|---------|----------|-------------|-------|
| `id` | `int` | `INTEGER` | No | Auto-increment PK | — |
| `title` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | — | — |
| `originalTitle` | `?string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | Yes | — | — |
| `slug` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | Unique; Gedmo Sluggable from `title` | Index `idx_book_slug` |
| `isbn` | `?string` | `VARCHAR(20)` | Yes | Unique when non-null (nullable unique index) | ISBN-10 or ISBN-13, stored as-is |
| `pages` | `?int` | `INTEGER` | Yes | — | — |
| `paragraphs` | `?int` | `INTEGER` | Yes | — | — |
| `frenchPublicationYear` | `?int` | `SMALLINT` | Yes | 4-digit year | — |
| `originalPublicationYear` | `?int` | `SMALLINT` | Yes | 4-digit year | — |
| `editionInfo` | `?string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | Yes | Free text | Ex: "2e édition revue et corrigée" |
| `saga` | `?string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | Yes | — | — |
| `volumeNumber` | `?int` | `SMALLINT` | Yes | — | — |
| `summary` | `?string` | `TEXT` | Yes | — | — |
| `coverImage` | `?string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | Yes | VichUploader managed | Stores relative file path |
| `status` | `BookStatus` | `VARCHAR(20)` | No | Enum; default `PENDING` | Index `idx_book_status` |
| `languages` | `array` | `JSON` | No | Default `[]`; ISO 639-1 codes | — |

**Relations**:

| Relation | Type | Target | Nullable | Options |
|----------|------|--------|----------|---------|
| `authors` | ManyToMany | `Author` | — | Owning side; join table `book_author` |
| `illustrators` | ManyToMany | `Illustrator` | — | Owning side; join table `book_illustrator` |
| `translator` | ManyToOne | `Translator` | Yes | — |
| `editor` | ManyToOne | `Editor` | No | — |
| `galleryImages` | OneToMany | `BookImage` | — | `cascade: ['remove']`, `orphanRemoval: true` |

**Database indexes**:
- `idx_book_slug` on `slug` (URL lookup)
- `idx_book_status` on `status` (access filter)
- `UNIQUE` on `isbn` (partial; enforced via application-level `UniqueEntity` + nullable unique index)

---

## Entity: Author

```php
// src/Entity/Author.php
#[ORM\Entity]
class Author
```

| Field | PHP Type | DB Type | Nullable | Notes |
|-------|----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `id` | `int` | `INTEGER` | No | Auto-increment PK |
| `firstName` | `string` | `VARCHAR(100)` | No | — |
| `lastName` | `string` | `VARCHAR(100)` | No | — |
| `slug` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | Unique; Gedmo Sluggable from `['firstName', 'lastName']` |

**Relations**: `books` — ManyToMany inverse side, `mappedBy: 'authors'`

---

Identical structure to `Author`.


|-------|----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `id` | `int` | `INTEGER` | No | Auto-increment PK |
| `firstName` | `string` | `VARCHAR(100)` | No | — |
| `lastName` | `string` | `VARCHAR(100)` | No | — |
| `slug` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | Unique; Gedmo Sluggable from `['firstName', 'lastName']` |

**Relations**: `books` — ManyToMany inverse side, `mappedBy: 'illustrators'`

```php
// src/Entity/Editor.php
#[ORM\Entity]
class Editor
```

| Field | PHP Type | DB Type | Nullable | Notes |
|-------|----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `id` | `int` | `INTEGER` | No | Auto-increment PK |
| `name` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | — |
| `slug` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | Unique; Gedmo Sluggable from `['name']` |

**Relations**: `books` — OneToMany inverse side, `mappedBy: 'editor'`

---

## Entity: BookImage

```php
// src/Entity/BookImage.php
#[ORM\Entity]
#[ORM\UniqueConstraint(name: 'uniq_book_tab', columns: ['book_id', 'tab'])]
class BookImage
```

| Field | PHP Type | DB Type | Nullable | Notes |
|-------|----------|---------|----------|-------|
| `id` | `int` | `INTEGER` | No | Auto-increment PK |
| `tab` | `BookImageTab` | `VARCHAR(20)` | No | Enum |
| `imagePath` | `string` | `VARCHAR(255)` | No | VichUploader managed |
| `book` | `Book` | FK `book_id` | No | ManyToOne |

**Database constraint**: `UNIQUE (book_id, tab)` — one image per tab per book.

---

## State Transitions (BookStatus)

```
[create] → PENDING
PENDING  → PUBLISHED   (ROLE_MODERATOR only — spec 007)
PENDING  → REJECTED    (ROLE_MODERATOR only — spec 007)
```

Access rules for this spec (FR-003):
- `PUBLISHED` → readable by everyone (anonymous + authenticated)
- `PENDING` / `REJECTED` → readable only by `ROLE_MODERATOR` or `ROLE_ADMIN`; others receive HTTP 404

---

## Migration Summary

One migration file covers:
1. Tables: `author`, `illustrator`, `translator`, `editor`, `book`, `book_image`
2. Join tables: `book_author`, `book_illustrator`
3. Indexes: `idx_book_slug`, `idx_book_status`, unique on `book.isbn`, unique on `uniq_book_tab`
4. Sluggable columns: unique indexes on `slug` in all five person/org entities

---

## Service: BookAccessChecker

```php
// src/Service/BookAccessChecker.php
class BookAccessChecker
{
    public function assertViewable(Book $book, ?UserInterface $user): void
    // Throws NotFoundHttpException if:
    //   $book->getStatus() !== BookStatus::PUBLISHED
    //   AND ($user === null OR !in_array('ROLE_MODERATOR', $user->getRoles()))
}
```

This is the only business logic service in this spec. `BookController::show()` calls it after loading the `Book` by slug, before rendering the template.

---

## Repository: BookRepository

Custom query method:
```php
public function findBySlugWithRelations(string $slug): ?Book
// Joins: authors, illustrators, translator, editor, galleryImages
// Single query with LEFT JOIN FETCH to avoid N+1
```
